name: Salmon-Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and remove any dark skin and bones.
2. Break the salmon into 1-inch pieces.
3. Heat the potato soup with milk, celery salt, and pepper until warm.
4. Add the broken salmon to the heated soup mixture.
5. Pour the entire mixture into a well-greased casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle Shredded Wheat evenly over the top of the mixture.
7. Dot the top layer with butter.
8. Place the casserole under the broiler for a few minutes until lightly browned.
